subject: DevOps
title: The DORA Metrics
description: A quick win: understand The DORA Metrics.

hook.text: How do you know if your DevOps is working? Four metrics, backed by years of research, tell you.

buildup.text: DORA studied thousands of teams. They found four metrics that predict software delivery performance.

discovery.text: Deployment frequency and lead time measure speed. Failure rate and recovery time measure stability.

twist.text: Elite teams score high on all four. Speed and stability aren't trade-offs — they reinforce each other.

climax.text: The annual State of DevOps report ranks organizations. DORA metrics have become the industry benchmark.

punchline.text: Four metrics tell the truth: frequency, lead time, failure, recovery.

quiz.question: According to DORA, what do elite teams prove about speed and stability?
options: They reinforce each other, not trade off
